heroHeadline: CIA Officers Confirmed Killed in Chihuahua Drug Lab Raid; Chapitos War Enters Lowest-Violence Phase
heroSubtitle: 636 days since El Mayo's capture — April 21: Two CIA officers and two Chihuahua AEI officials killed in crash returning from Sierra Tarahumara drug lab operation (six labs destroyed; Sheinbaum demands explanation). March 2026 saw the lowest Sinaloa homicide count since Sep 2024 (121 deaths), signaling the conflict is entering its epilogue. April 16: 5 Chapitos arrested in Escuinapa + García Harfuch's 10th security cabinet visit; 7 Chapitos arrested in one week. El Mayo EDNY sentencing postponed to May 18; Ovidio Chicago sentencing set July 27. CJNG confirmed new leader Juan Carlos Valencia González ('El 03') — US citizen, El Mencho's stepson.
footerNote: Data sourced from Noroeste, Riodoce, Proceso, InSight Crime, Reuters, AP, Animal Político, ACLED, DEA, SEDENA, SEMAR, Al Jazeera, AFP, Infobae, La Jornada, CBC News, Excelsior, El Diario del Noroeste, White House ONDCP, DOJ, El Informador, El Imparcial, Latin Times, Zeta Tijuana, NBC Los Angeles, KTLA, Washington Times, NBC Chicago, UPI, US State Department, CNN, Washington Post, CBS News, Expansión Política, La Razón, El Financiero
